itemListElement.reviewBody: yes same was with me like yesterday i went school meeting teachers and still we hv not left school officially but the officials denied us telling that u need a pass and after school hours u can visit inspite principal was telling us ki aap log jo teachers class mei hai unko disturb krna allowed nhi hai aur baki aap ghum sakte ho we were doing same but the permission was denied so the moment i felt dishearted that the school i hv been since nursery couldnt not eneter anymore

I am Mihul Malik. I have given my 12th board exam, and the results are still awaited, which means I am still a part of this school, correct? When I came to the school, firstly, the guards at the entry spoke very rudely. This is not the way to talk to anyone, I guess. Then the receptionist, Ms. Chitra Rajput, was so rude. That's not how you should talk to your own student. I totally agree with the protocols, but there should be some manners, right? I have done a lot of things for this school, literally a lot, and this is how I am treated. Unexpected.

School ha ya dj bar

Roj sube sube tum log sone ni dete

pls its a humble request

Dnt make a noise louder 🔊

Night shift krne wale bhi log hai vasundhra mh

Aise hi chalta rha toh puri colony complaint kr degi
Great place to study with great faculty
Through a welcoming atmosphere and emphasis on diversity, the school fosters an inclusive community where students can develop holistically under the guidance of dedicated teachers

AMITY INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL, Sector 1, Vasundhara - an institute for children wherein teachers are like mothers, their love, kindness, the way they nurture the children, the class environment they create makes the children all the more INSIGHTFUL and bask in the glory of CONFIDENCE. I would like to mention Monika Khanna ma'am here, who has been a great source of inspiration for my child in his Mental Math interests.
The school also provides the children with valuable learnings of our traditions which acts as an add on to the learning curriculum.

Thank you so much !!!

I would like to take this opportunity to express my gratitude.

I enrolled my child, Kaira Gupta, in Amity Vasundhara Sector-1 in Ist Standard in the session 2022-23 and I have seen stupendous improvements in her in the last one year.

I really appreciate the dedication and hard work of Nikita Ma'am and Richa Ma'am in the classroom. It was Kaira's first step in the formal school after play school and COVID and the way Nikita Ma'am put extra efforts to make her comfortable is really laudable. I appreciate all her extra time and efforts she put in to help my child grow and learn.

She always made her available for any kind of query or concern which actually helped us to understand and get congenial with the progress. The love and affection she gives to her class is something each parent looks for in a teacher.

I really thank them both for their dedication and compassion towards teaching, towards making a difference. Their performance has been outstanding!

And I can see it is the result of wise and strong leadership. The guidance and words of encouragement from the leadership  always motivate not only the staff but parents also.

We, Kaira's parents, are really happy and proud to have an Amitian.
Thank you for making a difference in my child's life.

Amity International school, Sector 1, Vasundhara is the best choice when it comes to holistic development of the child. Academically, it is one of the best schools in the area and the best part is that they imbibe the Indian culture by doing regular hawans, mantras recitation during lunch breaks, greeting teachers and parents with "Namaskar" which keeps the kids connected to roots, which is the need of the hour.
Their learning platform, Moodle is one of the best feature of the school. Even if a parent is unaware of the subject or the topics, the Moodle will make you or the child understand the concepts to the core.
The Amity administration is considerate and thoughtful. Their wonderful strategies and intellection reflects in their actions.

This is to express my gratitude to Amity a institution which has transformed my son to a "HERO".Thank you to you who is such a approachable principles to Vice principle maam who always carry a beautiful smile & so much of positive vibes.

I had a fear sending him too far but that only lasted for few days.

I want to express this gratitude to one person  who deserve the entire credit of this change, she is *Shruti Ma'am*
A person full of love, support, guidance, a true mentor.
At every step she has motivated us to climb each & every step. She is a hope who supported us in this entire one year.
A true "Guru" who never leave her disciple, she want every student of her to excel.

Though me & my entire family is grateful to her for all her love and care moreover her mentoring. I have never seen a teacher like her I hope I would had got such a teacher in my student life.

Thank you Maam
